Business Gateways Support Portal
Undergoing JSRS Certification Process
Company Profile Creation Support
1. The JSRS Company Profile is an exhaustive Profiling system that doubles as your Company Website with independent URL. It
contains a detailed Profile Management System that needs to be fully filled with all relevant Products & Services mapped to a
detailed Catalogue Structure and other relevant information.
2. For further support on creating Company Profile, please check the below provided video help link
''For Omani Suppliers'' & ''For International Suppliers''
3. If you need specific assistance from the JSRS team to help create the JSRS Company Profile, please
mail support@businessgateways.com and our team shall get back to you.
4. Please call our JSRS Call Centre on +968 2416 6123 and one of our Agents will attend to your query. Please note that the Call
Centre Agents might sometimes be occupied due to online traffic, and you may need to wait. Agents can converse in Arabic and
English.
Note: You can raise a Support Ticket on the JSRS Support System by directly mailing your Query / Complaint / Suggestion
to jsrs@businessgateways.com. The Support System is an efficient way to track your Tickets towards resolution.
 
Configuring Departments and adding multiple Users to JSRS
1. The JSRS provides for unlimited Departments and unlimited Users to be configured within your company.
2. Login as Administrator and visit Enterprise Admin module and follow the process.
3. If you need specific assistance from the JSRS team to help configure Departments and multiple Users, please
    mail support@businessgateways.com and our team shall get back to you.
 
JSRS Compliance Documents List
1. The JSRS Certificate is issued after your company goes through a diligence process by businessgateways Certifications
Department. As part of the process, you will be expected to upload information based on a standard checklist using the Supplier
Validation Form (SVF). ''See list of Mandatory Documents Required here''
https://support.businessgateways.com/portal/en/kb/articles/undergoing-jsrs-certiﬁcation-process-23-2-2022

2. In SVF some of the information is mandatory while others are optional. However, it is advised to maximize your document
upload for faster resolution of Certification.
Note: If there is any decline in the submission in the system, you need to update the documents or content as per the declined
comments and submit the form again for validation.
JSRS Certification Site Visit Support
The JSRS Site Visit is part of the Diligence process for JSRS Certification and is applicable ONLY to Omani Companies.
International Companies are exempt from Site Visit.
Note: The Online Site Visit option will be enabled only after the submission of the Supplier Validation Form (Tier 2).
 
JSRS Certification Status Check
1. Login to JSRS. On the Homepage Menu bar, under Quick Links click the listed JSRS Certificate to view & download your
JSRS Certificate if it is issued to you.
2. You can view the Approved Products & Certificates by scanning the QR Code on your JSRS Certificate.
3. Once your Certificate is approved, you join the JSRS Certified Suppliers Network (JSRS CSN) and you are eligible to
download the JSRS Certified Suppliers Badge from the Dashboard. You can use this on your mail signatures and Business Cards.
Note: You can raise a Support Ticket on the JSRS Support System by directly mailing your Query / Complaint / Suggestion
to jsrs@businessgateways.com. The Support System is an efficient way to track your Tickets towards resolution.
 
JSRS Certification Support Assistance
1. Please call our JSRS Call Centre on +968 2416 6123 and one of our Agents will attend to your query. Please note that the Call
Centre Agents might sometimes be occupied due to online traffic, and you may need to wait. Agents can converse in Arabic and
English.
2. You can raise a Support Ticket on the JSRS Support System by directly mailing your Query / Complaint / Suggestion
to jsrs@businessgateways.com. The Support System is an efficient way to track your Tickets towards resolution.
 
JSRS Training Participation
JSRS Support Team conducts regular Training Sessions (Online) explaining in-depth the various JSRS functions and processes for
the benefit of all Suppliers. Please check on ''JSRS Connect Link'' on your Dashboard to know when the next training session is
scheduled so that you can attend.
or ''Click and View the Scheduled Webinars''.
https://support.businessgateways.com/portal/en/kb/articles/undergoing-jsrs-certiﬁcation-process-23-2-2022

Business Gateways Support Portal
JSRS Fee Payment Support
Steps to complete an Online Payment
Here are the steps to complete an Online Payment:
1. Use your JSRS login credentials to access the JSRS Application.
2. On the Homepage, click Payment to download the Invoice. You will see all necessary details such as value, bank information,
etc.,
3. Choose Online Payment to pay through Oman Debit Cards or International Visa / MasterCard Credit Cards.
4. If you have any issues, please do not hesitate to raise a Support Ticket on JSRS Support System by sending an email
to jsrs@businessgateways.com. The Support Ticket is an efficient way to track your resolution. We hope this was helpful.
 
Steps to Upload Payment Proof
Here are the steps to Upload Payment Proof:
1. Log in to the JSRS Application with your JSRS login credentials.
2. In the JSRS Dashboard click Payment & click on Bank Transfer.
3. Choose Upload Payment Proof to upload the Payment Success Screenshot and click on Confirm Payment. Please make sure the
Payment Proof is a clear document. We hope this is helpful.
 
Steps to make a Bank Transfer
Here is how you can make a Bank Transfer:
1. Login to JSRS with your JSRS Admin User Credentials.
2. On the Homepage, click on Payment to download the Invoice (Bank Details are available on the invoice) and then complete the
Bank Transfer.
3. On successful payment completion, you MUST upload the Payment Proof screenshot for our verification.
4. Alternatively, you can also email the Payment Proof screenshot to accounts@businessgateways.com  
5. If you have any issues, please do not hesitate to raise a Support Ticket on JSRS Support System by sending an email
to jsrs@businessgateways.com. The Support Ticket is an efficient way to track your resolution.
 
Steps to Request a Payment Link
Here is how you can Request a Payment Link:
1. Email us at  accounts@businessgateways.com to request a Secure Payment Link and we will mail you the secure online
payment link to your registered email ID, in a day’s time.
2. Clicking on this payment link, you can pay with an Oman Debit Card, or any Visa / MasterCard Credit Cards to complete the
payment.
Note: You should use only the Secure Online Payment Link received in your email to complete the payment.
https://support.businessgateways.com/portal/en/kb/articles/jsrs-fee-payment-support-23-2-2022

3. If you have any issues, please do not hesitate to raise a Support Ticket on JSRS Support System by sending an email
to jsrs@businessgateways.com. The Support Ticket is an efficient way to track your resolution.
 
Cash/Cheque/DD Deposit through Cash & Deposit Machine (Applicable only to Omani Companies)
Note: Deposit should be made to the bank details available on the Invoice. Also if they fail to produce the payment proof online or
send us the payment proof through mail. We will unable to identify the company who paid and the payment approval process will
not be initiated.
1. Cash/Cheque/DD Deposit is allowed only in the event of an emergency and being unable to transact either through Online
Payment or Bank Transfer.
2. Once Cash/Cheque/DD Deposit is deposited in the account of businessgateways, the Proof of Payment must be immediately
uploaded on the JSRS Payment Page with the NBF Reference Number and Company name written on it.
3. Unresolved Cash Deposits will be kept in suspension until the Supplier reverts and identifies the payment proof.
GCC Tenders Fee Payment
1. Use your JSRS Admin login credentials to access the JSRS Application.
2. On the JSRS Dashboard> In the left menu bar > Opportunities > in that navigate to GCC Open Tenders section and click
Subscribe or Manage.
3. Choose your preferred Subscription Plan.
4. In the Payment Screen click Download Invoice. This invoice will contain all information required for a Bank Transfer.
5. Once your complete payment mail the payment proof to gcctenders@businessgateways.com to initiate activation of the GCC
Tender Subscription.
 
https://support.businessgateways.com/portal/en/kb/articles/jsrs-fee-payment-support-23-2-2022

JSRS Certiﬁed Suppliers Network (JSRS CSN)
Welcome to the
Connecting to Oman’s Procurement Action
https://businessgateways.com/

JSRS Certiﬁed Suppliers Network (JSRS CSN) 
www.businessgateways.com2
What is JSRS?
The Joint Supplier Registration System (JSRS) is a 'single window' mandatory supplier 
registration and certification system implemented in 2014 by businessgateways on 
behalf of the Ministry of Energy & Minerals, Oman (previously known as Ministry of 
Oil & Gas) as an industry-wide procurement system.
The JSRS Certification is a MANDATORY requirement for all Suppliers (National & 
International) wanting to connect with Oman’s Oil & Gas and other key Industries. 
Who Utilizes JSRS? 
Operators, Other Industry Buyers and EPCs across Oman utilize JSRS for their ongoing procurement operations.
JSRS Buyers Community Organisations
Contributing to Oman’s Pride & Procurement Oil & Gas Operators
The JSRS invites National and International Suppliers (Contractors, Engineers, Manufacturers, Exporters, Agents, 
Consultants and Service Providers) from Oil & Gas, Construction, ICT , Agriculture, Food and Fisheries, Health, 
Logistics, Education and Manufactures and other Industries to be part of the JSRS Certified Suppliers Network 
(JSRS CSN) and serve Oman’s Procurement requirements.
Oman’s Oil & Gas Procurement Potential 
Oman is the largest oil and gas producer in the Middle East that is not a member of the Organization of Petroleum Exporting 
Countries (OPEC). Oman’s proven natural gas reserves stand at approximately 677 billion cubic feet. Rising natural gas 
production over the last several years has resulted in the expansion of natural gas-based industries, such as petrochemicals, 
power generation, and the use of natural gas as a feedstock for enhanced oil recovery projects.
Oman continues its pursuit of economic diversification with procurement steadily growing to play a vital role in the field. 
Currently, the collective procurement spend of Oil & Gas Operators has crossed several billions of dollars. With projects 
worth billions in sectors like Oil & Gas, Mining, Water, Electricity and Power, Oman is looking for Suppliers offering and 
specializing in top quality Products/Services, that adhere to world class best practices.
To increase SME/LCC participation in local content-driven procurement activities, Oman pays a lot of attention to 
implementing proactive policies and investing towards skill development. 
Other Industry Buyers

www.businessgateways.com3
Welcome to
The JSRS Certified Suppliers Network (JSRS CSN)
The heart of JSRS is its Oman-centric Certified Suppliers 
Network holding thousands of national and international 
Suppliers interested in specifically serving Oman’s Supply 
Chain. This rich Supplier asset network known as JSRS 
Certified Suppliers Network (JSRS CSN) is the result of 
years of nonstop onboarding of the right mix of Suppliers, 
both from Oman and International communities by 
businessgateways.
The JSRS Certified Suppliers have undergone strict validation 
process to be certified and be ‘Procurement Ready’ for the 
JSRS Buyers Community. The JSRS CSN is a unique network 
consisting of thousands of best-of-breed credibility verified 
companies, playing an active role in the Procurement action 
in Oman.
The JSRS CSN includes SMEs, LCCs and Large companies (both Omani and international), who are recognized based on their 
activities such as Manufacturers, Agents, Dealers, Consultants, Contractors and so on. Through their profile on JSRS, Suppliers 
can showcase their Products & Services and connect to opportunities fostering Partnerships in Trade & Investment, Knowledge 
Transfer, and Export Operations.
As a Certified Suppliers on the JSRS, you automatically join the JSRS CSN to stay connected with all the procurement action 
and opportunities of Oman’s Oil & Gas Operators, key Buyers from other industries and EPCs.
Buyer-Supplier Engagement on JSRS
Receive Tenders, Advisories and other Procurement related content 
from JSRS Buyers & Contractors
Be Visible for Buyers opportunities through intensive supplier sourcing 
engagements
Participate in Tender Bidding through a transparent Contracts Management 
System
Stay compliant to Industry-wide In-Country Value (ICV) requirements
Provision for automated Buyer Access of supplier profiles
Apply for specific Buyer related pre-qualifications based on criteria 
established by Buyers

Business Gateways Support Portal
What next, after JSRS Certification?
 What other certificates can I apply for after receiving the JSRS Certificate?
 
After receiving the JSRS Certificate, Suppliers can apply for Additional Certificates on JSRS. Additional
Certificates are Buyer-Specific  accreditation  that suppliers can   apply for to gain business opportunities in
specific concession areas across Oman. The Additional Certificate are categorized into two sections – LCC
Special Status Certificates and Zonal Certificates.
What is the LCC Special Status in JSRS Certificate?
The ‘Local Community Contractor’ (LCC) Special Status is for companies operating within the concession areas
of certain Operators. LCCs who meet specific criteria, as defined by these Operators, are identified on the JSRS
Certificate as ‘Special Status’ LCC. Companies with the LCC Special Status benefit from priority procurement
opportunities from respective Operators. Omani Suppliers who qualify to be Local Community Contractors
(LCCs) can apply for the LCC Special Status in their JSRS Certificate. LCC Special Status approval on the
Certificate is currently endorsed by Petroleum Development of Oman (PDO), CC Energy Development S.A.L.
(Oman Branch) and Occidental Oman Incorporated (OXY).
What is PDO LCC JSRS Certificate?
Petroleum Development Oman popularly known as PDO collaborated with JSRS on its Local CommunityContractors (LCC) initiative. Companies, wherein ALL the Owners are permanent residents (as per National ID)in any of the following Cities in Oman: Adam, Al Jazur, Bahla, Haima, Ibri, Muqshin, Shalim Al-HallaniyahIslands and Thumrayt, can apply for Special Status category. The companies who successfully complete theirSpecial Status validation will be issued with the “PDO LCC” status on their JSRS Certification
   
What is CCED LCC JSRS Certificate?
CC Energy Development S.A.L. (Oman Branch) utilizes JSRS for its Local Community Contractors (LCC)
initiative, as part of their commitment to the Companies from concession areas. Any company, existing or new to
JSRS, wherein all owners are permanent residents (as per National ID) in any of the specified concession area of
CCED, can apply for the JSRS Certificate with LCC special status
 What is Occidental of Oman LCC JSRS Certificate?
Occidental Oman Incorporated (OXY) has launched their Local Community Contractors (LCC) Certification asa ‘Special Status’ within JSRS Certification. The companies, whose owners are from seven specific Wilayats
https://support.businessgateways.com/portal/en/kb/articles/what-next-after-jsrs-certiﬁcation

(Haima, Al Duqm, Al Jazir, Mahout, Ibri, Adam and Bahla), are eligible for the Occidental OmanIncorporated LCC status in JSRS. JSRS Suppliers can apply for OXY LCC ‘Special Status’ on JSRS.
What is the primary advantage of having Additional Certification on JSRS? Does acquiring the
JSRS Certificate alone mean that opportunities with Oil & Gas Operators will be limited?    
Apart from the JSRS Certificate, some Buyers require their Suppliers to hold an Additional Certification (issuedon fulfilment of that Buyer’s parameters) to be eligible for their procurement opportunities.
In most cases, the JSRS is more than enough to receive business opportunities. And in any case, it is a pre-requisite to receive any business opportunity from Oman’s O&G Sector.
Kindly visit our page on Additional Certification on JSRS to know more
 Are there any additional fees required to register for Additional Certifications?
No, as of now there are no additional fees required to register for Additional Certifications on JSRS.
Kindly visit our page on Additional Certification on JSRS to know more.
 
 
https://support.businessgateways.com/portal/en/kb/articles/what-next-after-jsrs-certiﬁcation

Business Gateways Support Portal
JSRS Certification Validity, Expiry and Renewal
          Is there a duration/expiry date on the JSRS Certificate?
Yes, there is an expiry date on the JSRS Certificate depending on the duration of certification selected at the time
of registration. JSRS Certificate duration for National (Omani) Suppliers is 3 years and for International suppliers
is either for 1 year or 3 years.
           Are we required to keep our data updated after JSRS Certification?
Yes, it is important that you update all critical data on your JSRS Profile regularly, as such data is usually
monitored and brought to the notice of Oil and Gas Operators and Other Industry Buyers.
How do we keep our data updated?
To keep your data updated in JSRS:
Log in to your profile.
Navigate to the  Master Company Profile  / Supplier Certification Form(SCF)  and edit the necessary information.
Save your changes.
Submit for validation.
Note: Regularly check and update your profile to ensure all information is Active.
            As an Omani company, how do we benefit under the ICV initiatives of JSRS?
The JSRS was born to encourage equal opportunities under the ICV specially for Omani SMEs. ICV Compliance
is a key component within the JSRS Certificate where parameters such as Omanisation is monitored regularly. On
the Contracts opportunities, the JSRS supports the SME/LCC Obligation Mandate for Buyer organisations who
fall under this category by providing for SME/LCC Obligation Tracking through a Transparent and effective
mechanism.
https://support.businessgateways.com/portal/en/kb/articles/jsrs-certiﬁcation-validity-expiry-and-renewal

Refer also LCC/SME under JSRS Certification Process
          How do we get a notification about my JSRS Certificate expiry date?
   
a)       Regular reminder mails are sent before the expiry date.
      b)      Your JSRS Certificate also reflects the valid until date.
      c)       When you log in to your JSRS dashboard, a popup will notify about your JSRS Renewal.
          How do we renew the JSRS Certificate?
In the Subscription Alert/Account Settings – Subscriptions & Payments page on your dashboard,
1. Click the Renew option.
2. Fill the JSRS Certification Subscription Renewal Form.
3. Generate JSRS Certification invoice and make the payment (Online / Offline Payment Modes available).
4. Update and Submit the Supplier Certification Form (SCF) for renewal.
5. JSRS Certificate will be renewed after successful completion of the SCF Validation Process.
For National (Omani) Suppliers, Certification is also subject to the Classification Validation (SME/Large) of your
Company at that point
           When should we renew the JSRS Certificate?
       
 a)       The JSRS Certificate needs to be renewed before (or) on the expiry date.
       b)    The Renewal Form is enabled throughout the Certification duration which enables suppliers to RENEW
anytime.   
 c)    On expiry, JSRS renewal continues to remain active for a grace period of 10 days following which
the Subscription automatically terminates if it isn't renewed.
           What will happen if we do not renew our JSRS Certificate?
The JSRS Certification is a mandatory requirement by the Oman Ministry of Energy and Minerals in order to
connect with the procurement opportunities from the Oil & Gas Industry and Other Industries in Oman.
Consequences of Suppliers holding Expired JSRS Certificate are:
1. Exclusion from the ‘Active’ Supplier list of Operators and Other Industry Buyers for their Sourcing process.
2. Non-eligibility to obtain any contract from the Oil & Gas Operators and from Other Industry Buyers even if
you win a bid.
3. Termination of all NBF and JSRS services.
https://support.businessgateways.com/portal/en/kb/articles/jsrs-certiﬁcation-validity-expiry-and-renewal

4. Removal of your company data from the JSRS.

renew?
       
You may but there is no guarantee that all your data is still with us. So please contact

jsrs_validity_renewal.pdf.full_text:
Business Gateways Support Portal
JSRS Certification Validity, Expiry and Renewal
          Is there a duration/expiry date on the JSRS Certificate?
Yes, there is an expiry date on the JSRS Certificate depending on the duration of certification selected at the time
of registration. JSRS Certificate duration for National (Omani) Suppliers is 3 years and for International suppliers
is either for 1 year or 3 years.
           Are we required to keep our data updated after JSRS Certification?
Yes, it is important that you update all critical data on your JSRS Profile regularly, as such data is usually
monitored and brought to the notice of Oil and Gas Operators and Other Industry Buyers.
How do we keep our data updated?
To keep your data updated in JSRS:
Log in to your profile.
Navigate to the  Master Company Profile  / Supplier Certification Form(SCF)  and edit the necessary information.
Save your changes.
Submit for validation.
Note: Regularly check and update your profile to ensure all information is Active.
            As an Omani company, how do we benefit under the ICV initiatives of JSRS?
The JSRS was born to encourage equal opportunities under the ICV specially for Omani SMEs. ICV Compliance
is a key component within the JSRS Certificate where parameters such as Omanisation is monitored regularly. On
the Contracts opportunities, the JSRS supports the SME/LCC Obligation Mandate for Buyer organisations who
fall under this category by providing for SME/LCC Obligation Tracking through a Transparent and effective
mechanism.
https://support.businessgateways.com/portal/en/kb/articles/jsrs-certiﬁcation-validity-expiry-and-renewal
Refer also LCC/SME under JSRS Certification Process
          How do we get a notification about my JSRS Certificate expiry date?
   
a)       Regular reminder mails are sent before the expiry date.
      b)      Your JSRS Certificate also reflects the valid until date.
      c)       When you log in to your JSRS dashboard, a popup will notify about your JSRS Renewal.
          How do we renew the JSRS Certificate?
In the Subscription Alert/Account Settings – Subscriptions & Payments page on your dashboard,
1. Click the Renew option.
2. Fill the JSRS Certification Subscription Renewal Form.
3. Generate JSRS Certification invoice and make the payment (Online / Offline Payment Modes available).
4. Update and Submit the Supplier Certification Form (SCF) for renewal.
5. JSRS Certificate will be renewed after successful completion of the SCF Validation Process.
For National (Omani) Suppliers, Certification is also subject to the Classification Validation (SME/Large) of your
Company at that point
           When should we renew the JSRS Certificate?
       
 a)       The JSRS Certificate needs to be renewed before (or) on the expiry date.
       b)    The Renewal Form is enabled throughout the Certification duration which enables suppliers to RENEW
anytime.   
 c)    On expiry, JSRS renewal continues to remain active for a grace period of 10 days following which
the Subscription automatically terminates if it isn't renewed.
           What will happen if we do not renew our JSRS Certificate?
The JSRS Certification is a mandatory requirement by the Oman Ministry of Energy and Minerals in order to
connect with the procurement opportunities from the Oil & Gas Industry and Other Industries in Oman.
Consequences of Suppliers holding Expired JSRS Certificate are:
1. Exclusion from the ‘Active’ Supplier list of Operators and Other Industry Buyers for their Sourcing process.
2. Non-eligibility to obtain any contract from the Oil & Gas Operators and from Other Industry Buyers even if
you win a bid.
3. Termination of all NBF and JSRS services.
https://support.businessgateways.com/portal/en/kb/articles/jsrs-certiﬁcation-validity-expiry-and-renewal
4. Removal of your company data from the JSRS.
          Our JSRS Certificate has already expired, and the grace period has lapsed as well. Can we still
renew?
       
You may but there is no guarantee that all your data is still with us. So please contact
jsrsrenewal@businessgateways.com for the process of re-registering/renewing
 
 
https://support.businessgateways.com/portal/en/kb/articles/jsrs-certiﬁcation-validity-expiry-and-renewal

Business Gateways Support Portal
Other Benefits on JSRS / Miscellaneous
What is GCC Open Tenders Service?
BGI in its endeavour to provide value-added services to its JSRS Suppliers, offers GCC Open Tenders
Notifications from all Sectors across 6 GCC countries. Existing JSRS suppliers can subscribe to receive Open
Tender Notifications from all 6 GCC countries. Suppliers can choose from a wide range of categories/sub-
categories at amazing offers.
Free Subscription to GCC Open Tenders Service
BGI is offering 3 Months Free Subscription to GCC Open Tenders Service to new Suppliers who have completed
their payment and Tier 1 validation. A notification will be sent to the user with the offer details for free access to 1
tender category (including all related sub-categories) for 3 Months. if the Supplier has not availed this offer, then
the offer will get elapsed exactly in 30 days from the received notification mail.
The Supplier must subscribe to GCC Open Tenders Service to receive access to more than 1 Tender Category.
  How do I subscribe to GCC Open Tenders through JSRS?
Registered JSRS Suppliers can follow these steps to subscribe to GCC Open Tenders:
Login to JSRS.
Click Opportunities from the side menu, click on GCC Tenders and select a subscription pack.
Choose the allowed number of Categories and Sub-Categories that support your business interests.
By default, the Categories and Sub-Categories are applicable to all 6 GCC Countries, however you may select
specific GCC countries based on your preference.
Generate the invoice and complete the payment (Online through Credit Card or Offline through bank transfer).
Once your payment is approved, you will automatically begin receiving GCC Open Tender notifications.
Assign the GCC Open Tender Service to the right user(s) in your company.
If you have queries regarding GCC Open Tender, kindly visit our FAQ or send us an enquiry. Non-JSRS Suppliers
are kindly requested to register on JSRS if they wish to subscribe to GCC Open Tenders.
   Is the subscription fee for GCC Open Tenders billed monthly or annually?
GCC Open Tenders Service – Subscription Packs start as low as USD 15/OMR 2 per month and is billed annually.
If you have queries regarding GCC Open Tender, kindly send us an enquiry.
https://support.businessgateways.com/portal/en/kb/articles/other-beneﬁts-on-jsrs

What are the FREE subscriptions on market intelligence reports available for JSRS Suppliers?
BGI has signed strategic alliances with Oxford Business Group (OBG) and The Energy Year (TEY) to deliver
internationally acclaimed intelligence on markets based on sectors and countries. Our Suppliers gain free access to
these online market reports published by OBG and TEY. Read more on Online Market Reports
 Does JSRS provide B2B, Business Partnerships and other business opportunities beyond
Oman?
Suppliers can enhance their business opportunities by accessing the e-Marketplace known as the National
Business Framework (NBF) a 'B2B stimulation' platform on JSRS. The NBF has thousands of companies across
hundreds of countries and forms the foundation platform of the Oman Procurement system - JSRS. Equipped with
multiple proactive B2B tools, the NBF e-Marketplace is a simple way where users of a single company can
connect with other related companies worldwide to foster Business Partnerships, Distribution Networks etc. It is
also possible to subscribe to GCC Open Tenders to stay connected to opportunities within the entire GCC through
this platform.
 How many users from our company can be added to one JSRS profile?
The JSRS profile enables you to add unlimited users per company on the platform. You can manage user rights
through the Admin Panel of the Admin User.
 Will I receive tender opportunities via email, or do I have to frequently login to JSRS?
All the tenders will be directly sent to your registered email Id depending on the requirements, provided you hold
a valid JSRS Certificate*. Suppliers must select their preferred sectors to receive email notification for enquires
posted towards the sectors on JSRS -CMS. However, it is always recommended that you login to JSRS frequently
to make sure you don’t miss out on any opportunities.
Additionally, businessgateways provides value-added services to its JSRS Suppliers. The GCC Open Tenders
Notifications Service from all sectors across 6 GCC countries, allows you to receive happening Tender
Notifications directly in your JSRS. Existing JSRS suppliers can subscribe to GCC Tenders Notification Service,
to receive Open Tender Notifications from all 6 GCC countries. There is a wide range of categories / sub-
categories to choose from, at affordable prices. Read more
*Supplier Certification Mandate
The Oman Ministry of Energy & Minerals has recently Mandated, with effect from 1 July 2021, all Suppliers who
participate in any bidding activities floated by the Oil & Gas Operators and Concession Companies, must hold an
ACTIVE JSRS Certificate. Contractors and Suppliers who are awarded Contracts and POs must hold an ACTIVE JSRS
Certificate during the entire tenure of the Contract.
  
How can we best we use the JSRS to gain more opportunities? How will I learn of employee
requirements through JSRS
If you update your products and services in detail, and tag them properly, your service will be seen by
https://support.businessgateways.com/portal/en/kb/articles/other-beneﬁts-on-jsrs

Procurement Officials who  utilize the JSRS.Proactively, we recommend you search for companies (for example in Construction) as per classification using theB2B tools on NBF and directly communicate your service to Large / SME companies in Oman. To know more
about NBF, visit this  https://businessgateways.com/national-business-framework
Are international EPCs, who have received a contract in Oman, obligated to send their
enquiries for supply of Products or Services to JSRS registered companies?
This depends on the Obligation Contract Terms & Conditions listed out by the Project Owner (Operator / Buyer)
who has awarded the contract to the EPC. Normally this is defined on the JSRS Contracts Management System,
where if an SME/LCC Obligation has been set towards an awarded contract, the EPC is obligated to source
eligible SME Companies, using JSRS. If the JSRS CMS access has been provided by the Project Owner to the
EPC, they can also search for Omani Product & Services, listed.
The JSRS Contracts Management System (JSRS-CMS), integrates Supplier Sourcing, eTendering, , Award &
Tracking of the entire Project's/Contract's Supply Chain.
The Ministry of Energy and Minerals, Oman has Mandated the JSRS-CMS for Operators to monitor their sub-
contracting activities. Other Project Owners and Contractors also use JSRS-CMS to enforce MSME/LCC
Obligations. Kindly visit this link to learn more on JSRS-CMS: https://businessgateways.com/jsrs/jsrs-cms/
 
 
https://support.businessgateways.com/portal/en/kb/articles/other-beneﬁts-on-jsrs

Business Gateways Support Portal
JSRS Registration/Certification Process &
Subscription Fee details.
How do we apply for JSRS Certification?
A.  Interested companies can register online on www.businessgateways.com.
B.  Upon submitting the JSRS Registration form, a confirmation mail will be sent to the registered
      company email ID.
      Note: Order confirmation is a ‘must’ to proceed further, so please confirm acceptance of the mail
       received from businessgateways.
C.  On receipt of order confirmation, the Login credentials to JSRS shall be sent to your registered
      company email ID.
D.  Login and complete the JSRS Certification fee paymentprocess and update your company profile.
F.  JSRS Certification process involves:
1. Enterprise Admin
2. MCP (Master company Profile)
3. Supplier Profile
4. SCF (Supplier Certification Form)
     
         Tier 3 – Industry Certification by JSRS Buyers
JSRS Certification Fee Structure
Oman:
1. Companies registering from Oman are subject to following fee structure, as per the Small and Medium Enterprise Development
Authority(SMEDA). SME-Micro: OMR 50,  SME-Small: OMR 100,  SME-Medium: OMR 100,  Large Companies: OMR
900.
2. The JSRS Certification Fees shown above are for a subscription period of Three Years.
3. Please note that your Company Classification is based on your Total Employee count & your Annual Sales Turnover.
4. Choose the right Classification during the Registration or your Certification process will be delayed due to the Classification
change process during diligence check.
Note:
·         JSRS Subscription Fee mentioned is excluding VAT of 5%. VAT charges are applicable only to Omani
companies.
https://support.businessgateways.com/portal/en/kb/articles/jsrs-registration-process-fees-structure-23-2-2022

·         JSRS Subscription Fee is exclusive of any payment processing charges that may be applicable.
To know more about the JSRS Subscription Fee refer to the Certification Fee tab in the Registration page.
 
International:
Option 1: USD 1,000 for One Year.
Option 2: USD 2,250 for Three Years.
Note:
·         JSRS Subscription Fee is exclusive of any payment processing charges that may be applicable.
To know more about the JSRS Subscription Fee refer to the Certification Fee tab in the Registration page.
What are the modes of payment available?
   
 There are two modes of payment available on the JSRS Application:
Online Payment
Offline Payment
 
Online Payment:
The JSRS Certification fee can be paid online through the Payment Gateway of Bank Muscat hosted on the JSRS.
You can also pay using Credit/Debit cards. It is important that your Credit/Debit Cards are '3D Secure' approved
before it can be used on our system.
 
 Offline Payment:
 The offline payment can be done via:
Cheque or Cash Deposit
 Bank Transfer
The JSRS Subscription Fee for International Company is relatively higher than the Fee for
Omani Companies. Do you offer special rates/Subsidized rates for Micro or Small
overseas companies
The JSRS Subscription fee for Suppliers is set by the Ministry of Energy and Minerals, Oman and is based on the
supplier origin (National or  International).     
Further, in Oman, it is based on Company Classification (SME & Large) standards set by the Small and Medium
Enterprise Development Authority(SMEDA).
To know more about the JSRS Subscription Fee refer to the Certification Fee tab in the Registration page. 
https://support.businessgateways.com/portal/en/kb/articles/jsrs-registration-process-fees-structure-23-2-2022

What are the Pricing Policies for Suppliers?
The Certification fee for suppliers is set by the Ministry of Energy and Minerals, Oman and the actual value is based
on the supplier origin (National or International).
For Omani companies, the employee count, and annual sales (revenue) are the deciding factors for the JSRS
certification fee, and the company classification is as per Small and Medium Enterprise Development
Authority(SMEDA) classification standards. Information regarding the current Supplier Fee and the
Certification Duration is outlined on www.businessgateways.com.
Do we need to pay separately for NBF and JSRS Platforms?
No. A single payment is enough to gain access to the NBF and JSRS Platforms.
What is Tier 1 on JSRS?
A. The Tier 1 of JSRS is an e-Marketplace (B2B) Platform initiative known as Oman National Business
Framework.
B.  Suppliers are expected to ready their company profile here and are encouraged to use the critical B2B Tools
that are available on this tier.
C.  All Products and Services offered by the Suppliers are uploaded here through an exhaustive Catalogue
Management System built using the JSRS Category Code - UNSPSC based, These Products and Services shall be
Validated on SCF ( Supplier Certification Form) of JSRS.
D. The NBF also supports bringing in multiple users from within each supplier organization for better
collaboration and integration to the e-Marketplace.
E. Upon profile validation, suppliers can gain access to and network with thousands of credibility-verified
companies across 95+ countries.
F.  Suppliers can subscribe for open tender notifications from all sectors of the 6 GCC countries. 
What is Tier 2 on JSRS?
A. The JSRS Tier 2 Consists  Buyers Community, JSRS Tenders, CMS (Contractors Management system) and
Jsearch.
What is Tier 3 on JSRS?
Joining the JSRS Certified Suppliers Network (JSRS-CSN) on Tier-2 allows access to Additional
Certifications/Pre-Qualification options for certain Buyer Community organizations. Tier-3 enables these
organization-specific certifications but is currently available only to Omani companies meeting specific criteria.
https://support.businessgateways.com/portal/en/kb/articles/jsrs-registration-process-fees-structure-23-2-2022
https://support.businessgateways.com/portal/en/kb/articles/jsrs-registration-process-fees-structure-23-2-2022

pages.text:
Business Gateways Support Portal
Products and Services
           What is the Coding Standard used for Products & Services?
JSRS has been using the comprehensive coding standards of the United Nations Standards for Products &
Services Code (UNSPSC) system for catalog management of all your Products and Services.
With the release of the new JSRS, a new Coding system – JSRS Category Code (JCC) has been
implemented. The JCC is devised to:
Improve the ease and effectiveness of mapping exact Products & Services within the Oil & Gas
Industry
Improve Search Engine Optimisation for effective Sourcing by the JSRS Buyers Community
All existing UNSPSC based Products & Services are now mapped to the JCC
           Is there a limit to the number of Products & Services we can upload?
No, there is no limit to the number of products and services a company can upload on its profile page. However,
we recommend that you frequently update your products and services page.
          Is the JSRS Certification related to specific Products & Services?
Yes. The JSRS Certification is linked to specific products or services from under your products and services list,
that are approved by businessgateways. It is advisable to add all your products or services to your JSRS
Certificate since the more products and services you have approved, the more tendering opportunities your
company will receive.
           After Certification, can I add or remove the Certified Products?
Yes, you can add or remove Products & Services on the JSRS Certificate.
To add a Products & Services, the details need to be updated on the Supplier Profile (Tier 1) and all the
relevant documents need to be updated.
Supplier must add the Products & Services for JSRS Certification by using the Map Products &
Services for JSRS Certification.
The added Products & Services will be subject to a validation by BGI Backend team.
On successful validation, the Products & Services will be tagged as JSRS Certified
https://support.businessgateways.com/portal/en/kb/articles/products-and-services

Option to remove a Products & Services will be available under Action.
           How to view the approved products and services?
The JSRS Certificate provides a feature to view the approved products and services of your company. Scan the QR code on
your JSRS Certificate.
 
 
 
 
https://support.businessgateways.com/portal/en/kb/articles/products-and-services

Business Gateways Support Portal
Products and Services
           What is the Coding Standard used for Products & Services?
JSRS has been using the comprehensive coding standards of the United Nations Standards for Products &
Services Code (UNSPSC) system for catalog management of all your Products and Services.
With the release of the new JSRS, a new Coding system – JSRS Category Code (JCC) has been
implemented. The JCC is devised to:
Improve the ease and effectiveness of mapping exact Products & Services within the Oil & Gas
Industry
Improve Search Engine Optimisation for effective Sourcing by the JSRS Buyers Community
All existing UNSPSC based Products & Services are now mapped to the JCC
           Is there a limit to the number of Products & Services we can upload?
No, there is no limit to the number of products and services a company can upload on its profile page. However,
we recommend that you frequently update your products and services page.
          Is the JSRS Certification related to specific Products & Services?
Yes. The JSRS Certification is linked to specific products or services from under your products and services list,
that are approved by businessgateways. It is advisable to add all your products or services to your JSRS
Certificate since the more products and services you have approved, the more tendering opportunities your
company will receive.

Business Gateways Support Portal
JSRS Password Reset Procedure
Go to the application: www.businessgateways.com/jsrs  or use the JSRS Mobile application
Click on LOGIN button
Click on Forgot Password
Enter your Email ID or Username or Mobile Number.
You can click on the link provided in your email to change the password provided you have given
your correct Email ID (or)
Enter the OTP that is received on your email
Enter the NEW PASSWORD and CONFIRM PASSWORD. Click SET PASSWORD
Note: Your Password Should contain
Minimum 8 characters
One uppercase
One number
One special character
Note: At present, only the Web Application is LIVE. The Mobile Applications will be launched at a later
date.
https://support.businessgateways.com/portal/en/kb/articles/jsrs-password-reset-procedure
